title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Guided Eval Studio
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a durable task state and handoff record while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

workshop case — Use a changed workshop case for prompt long context that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

What must be established before implementation?

stimulus.title: Handoff Quality case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed workshop case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery. Artifact under review: a durable task state and handoff record.

options.text: For audit the initial evidence packet, apply Handoff Quality without its stated preconditions, omit the a durable task state and handoff record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Handoff Quality for a durable task state and handoff record.
The record names the assumption, applies Handoff Quality, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Handoff Quality record says a durable task state and handoff record looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve audit the initial evidence packet.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-1wwvgp" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Handoff Quality into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-handoff-quality-1wwvgp
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.text: The Handoff Quality structural check is only one gate. a durable task state and handoff record must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.

stimulus.title: Handoff Quality failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A list of edited filenames is a complete handoff.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Handoff Quality condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

Keep the plausible Handoff Quality output and hide the violated a durable task state and handoff record assumption instead of explaining the failure. This does not resolve test an acceptance boundary.

For test an acceptance boundary, apply Handoff Quality without its stated preconditions, omit the a durable task state and handoff record trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Handoff Quality for a durable task state and handoff record.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write the workshop evidence note for Handoff Quality: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed workshop case for prompt long context that tests this competency: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Handoff Quality through the concrete a durable task state and handoff record case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
